helpful: Google Web Search was extremely helpful for researching circuit splits and Supreme Court cert-denial trends.
Local statpack.md provided general SCOTUS base rates.
CourtListener MCP get_endpoint_item successfully retrieved the docket metadata.
gaps: Remote corpus-query ranged backend requires configured DVC S3 remote URL, which was not set in the environment.
CourtListener MCP search and call_endpoint tools failed due to missing REDIS_URL for session storage.
notes: CourtListener MCP server is configured with dependencies (Redis) that failed in this environment, but google_web_search and local statpack.md were sufficient to verify legal and procedural context.
